title: Project Overview вЂ” Telegram Bot for Claude Code via tmux
description: ccbot bridges Telegram forum topics to Claude Code sessions running inside tmux windows. Each topic maps 1-to-1 to a session. The README and architecture doc provide the big picture.

title: Entry Point & Configuration
description: The CLI entry point in main.py parses args and wires everything together. pyproject.toml defines dependencies (python-telegram-bot, libtmux, Pillow, httpx). Config loads .env for TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and ALLOWED_USERS.

title: Bot Application Core
description: create_bot() in bot.py sets up the Application, registers handlers, and manages lifecycle (post_init / post_shutdown). Auth helpers gate access. Rate limiting (AIORateLimiter) protects against Telegram 429s. Startup re-resolution remaps stale window IDs after tmux restart.

title: Session Management вЂ” Bindings & State
description: SessionManager resolves topics to windows and windows to sessions. thread_bindings (topicв†’window_id) live in memory and persist in state.json. session_map.json (written by the hook) maps window_idв†’session_id. Dual-state design enables clean startup recovery.

title: Session Monitoring вЂ” Polling & Offset Tracking
description: SessionMonitor polls JSONL transcripts every 2s, detects mtime changes, reads new lines incrementally. MonitorState tracks byte offsets per file to avoid re-processing. tool_useв†”tool_result pairing tracks pending tool calls across poll cycles for in-place message edits.

title: Tmux Integration вЂ” Windows, Hooks & Parsing
description: TmuxManager wraps libtmux to list/find/create/kill windows, send keystrokes, and capture pane output. The hook script receives Claude Code SessionStart events via stdin and writes session_map.json. TerminalParser detects interactive UI prompts (AskUserQuestion, Permission, ExitPlanMode). TranscriptParser parses JSONL entries and formats expandable quotes.

title: Message Pipeline вЂ” Sending, Formatting & Queuing
description: telegram_sender.py handles split_message (4096-char limit) and rate-limited safe_send/safe_edit/safe_reply with MarkdownV2 fallback. markdown_v2.py converts Markdown to Telegram MarkdownV2 with expandable quotes. A per-user message queue (message_queue.py) merges consecutive content, breaks on tool boundaries, and deduplicates status updates.

title: Handlers вЂ” Interactive UI, Browsing & Routing
description: Inline keyboard handlers manage directory browsing (directory_browser.py), session picker, interactive UI prompts (interactive_ui.py), history pagination (response_builder.py), status polling (status_polling.py), and topic cleanup (cleanup.py). The callback_router dispatches all CB_* prefixed queries to the correct handler.

title: Testing & CI Quality Gates
description: The check.yml pipeline enforces ruff lint/format, pyright type checking, and pytest across Python 3.12/3.13. Unit tests cover config, session, monitor_state, transcript_parser, terminal_parser, telegram_sender, markdown_v2, hook, transcribe, and all handlers. Integration tests validate config loading and monitor state persistence.

title: Beyond вЂ” Agentic Pipeline & Extensions
description: The .agentic/ system provides an automated refactoring pipeline (analyzeв†’planв†’implementв†’validateв†’draft PR) driven by the knowledge graph. The CLI (scripts/agentic/cli.py) and MCP server expose pipeline tools to Grok. Screenshot rendering (screenshot.py) captures terminal output as PNG. Voice transcription (transcribe.py) supports gpt-4o-transcribe for voice messages.
